content.en:
The capital of bloody war, in a deep void, there are many thrones here, and the majestic figures sit here, all of them are perfect controllers.

"Recently, a very good half-step perfect controller has come to the Blood War Capital, only one hundred eternal years, and he has gone from the last place to the three hundred and thirty-sixth on the Blood Battle List, it seems to be a member of the Daoless Tower!"

"It's indeed a new member of my Wudao Tower, it's not bad!"

"This is not bad, it's just too demonic!"

"It's just three hundred and thirty-six, and it's not that there hasn't been a half-step perfect controller who has made rapid progress in the past, but there is almost no progress in the later stage. Some half-step perfect controllers have obtained very amazing treasures, and they deliberately do not use them, and only use them after entering the bloody battle capital, creating the illusion that they have made great progress. Therefore, we don't need to pay too much attention to it at the moment, if he can reach the top ten in 10,000 eternal years, it will be worthy of our attention. "

"Yes, there is no point in making fast progress in the early stage, how many amazing half-step perfect controllers have not stepped into the perfect controller in the end!"

"You guys are just jealous, wait and see, my Ye Tian of the Daoless Pagoda can definitely make such rapid progress all the time. "

Subsequently.

These perfect controllers didn't continue to discuss Ye Tian.

......

In the following years, Ye Tian was still making steady progress, but the speed of progress was not as fast as before.

"I still have to create a top-notch perfect mastery technique!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

So, he prepared one of the copy bodies to concentrate all his efforts on the top perfect mastery technique, while the other copy bodies and the will clones practiced other aspects.

In this way, the years flew by, and a thousand eternal years passed.

At this time, Ye Tian had already broken one hundred and twenty-eight chains of control, and with the assistance of the flowing gold liquid, his control body had already reached the half-step perfect control body of the small adult level.

And his perfect body physique has already reached the perfection realm, but this physique is no longer suitable for him, after all, it is just a secret technique created by a perfect controller when he is still weak, it is nothing.

In addition, Ye Tian had mastered more than eight hundred kinds of Dao above the billions of changes, and his progress speed could be said to be very fast.

As for the perfect control technique, Ye Tian has also created a few more doors, which can be regarded as providing direction and foundation for creating a top perfect controller.

Finally this day.

Ye Tian created a top-notch perfect control technique, which was created with the help of multiple perfect-level ancestral endowments.

This Perfect Control Technique is the Ten Thousand Dao Blade, which was created by the perfect control technique Ten Thousand Dao Blades, thus banning the previous Ten Thousand Dao Blades and becoming Ye Tian's most powerful top Perfect Control Skill at present.

After creating the Ten Thousand Dao Blades, Ye Tian's strength ushered in a huge transformation.

At this moment, Ye Tian had truly stepped into the top half-step perfect control power, and he was not the weakest kind.

At the same time, Ye Tian's progress was known by the Blood Battle Rankings, so his ranking instantly surpassed many half-step perfect controllers.

No. 112 on the Blood Battle List: Ye Tian, the Endless Master

This is Ye Tian's current ranking!

When Ye Tian reached this ranking, many people were shocked.

"How is this possible, Ye Tian has actually reached the one hundred and twelfth place on the Blood Battle List, how long has he been on the Blood Battle List, and his progress is so fast!"

"According to the information I heard, Ye Tian should have just broken through to the half-step perfect controller, and not long after he came to the Blood War Capital. According to his ranking, it can be deduced that he has now become a top half-step perfect master!"

"A little more than a thousand years of eternity, from just breaking through to a half-step perfect master, directly stepping into the top perfect master, this kind of improvement is terrifying!"

"Which of the top 100 on the Blood War List is not a demon who has cultivated more than tens of thousands of eternal years on the Blood War List? He has been in the Blood War Capital for such a short time, and he has such a ranking, it is too demonic and terrifying!"

"There is not much difference in the progress of the top 100 on the Blood Battle List, according to his progress speed, he may really be able to become the first on the Blood Battle List before the 100,000 Eternal Age!"

"The first place on the blood battle list, it's indeed possible!"

However.

Many half-step perfect controllers thought that Ye Tian had used a lot of opportunities in the Blood Battle Capital, but in fact, Ye Tian hadn't used a few opportunities at all now.

After becoming the top half-step perfect master, Ye Tian was ready to make good use of the opportunity of the Blood Battle Capital.

"Let's go to the Black Delirium River in Zhendao Mountain first!"

Ye Tian decided.

The Black Delirium River is undoubtedly one of the best opportunities in Zhendao Mountain, once you enter the Black Delirium River, your physical body will be tempered by the Delirium River all the time, and the deeper the Delirium River, the better the effect of the tempering.

With Ye Tian's current record of being the one hundred and twelfth on the Blood Battle List, he could stay in the Black Delirium River for more than a hundred eternal years, which was why he entered here so late.

In this way, he can practice here for a long time, so that his half-step perfectly controlled body will be greatly improved, and his strength will also be greatly improved.

Airplanes!

Ye Tian came to the Black Delirium River, which was full of oppression, and the Black Delirium River seemed to have turned into an endless black air current, and it was like an endless abyss, crushing the eternal time and space.

Ye Tian stepped into the Black Delirium River, constantly deepening, and the endless pressure hit, and the power of the Black Delirium River continued to pour into his controlled body, frantically refining his controlled body.

Of course, the pressure on him is immense.

Soon, Ye Tian came to the incomparably deep place of the Black Delirium River, which was also very close to his limit.

"Let's practice here!"

Ye Tian decided.

Rumble!!!!

The power of the Black Delirium River was frantically refining Ye Tian's body, and this refining also penetrated deep into the roots, which could help break the chains of control.

Click!!

One by one, the chains of control were broken, and Ye Tian's body of control continued to improve.

Eternal years have passed, and Ye Tian's strength is constantly improving.

Finally, after spending more than sixty eternal years, Ye Tian finally entered the top 100 of the Blood Battle List.

......

No Road Tower.

The Lord of Bloodshed has received a summons from the Bloody Capital.

"Ye Tian has entered the top 100 of the Blood Battle List, this speed is too fast!"

The Lord of Blood Separation was shocked.

He originally thought that it would be good for Ye Tian to be able to enter the top three hundred of the Blood Battle List at this time, but he never expected Ye Tian's progress to be so fast.

After all.

People entered the Blood War Capital many years earlier, and the Blood War List calculates the total progress, why did Ye Tian surpass the progress of tens of thousands of eternal years in such a short time!

But now, Ye Tian has done it!

"It's worthy of a demon with a talent value of more than 100,000!"

The Lord of Blood sighed.
